nodes.name: Hard Crash
nodes.description: Server process dies, request returns error, or CUDA/NPU kernel fault

nodes.name: Silent Precision Loss
nodes.description: Output is plausible but numerically wrong — wrong token probabilities, positional errors, or logit shifts that don't crash the server

nodes.name: Token-Level Output Divergence
nodes.description: Generated token sequence differs from reference (non-spec) decoding at temperature=0

nodes.name: Accept Rate Computation Error
nodes.description: Speculative accept rate is wrong but output tokens may still be correct (target model corrects draft errors)

nodes.name: Logit Computation Error
nodes.description: Target model logits are incorrect due to tree attention masking bugs, KV cache corruption, or kernel errors — may or may not change argmax

nodes.name: Performance Regression
nodes.description: Throughput or latency degradation without correctness impact

nodes.name: 短序列精确比对 (Short-Range Exact Match)
nodes.description: Dual-server string comparison at temperature=0. Limited to 16 tokens because bfloat16 batched-attention vs sequential-attention accumulation order can flip argmax at near-ties beyond this length.
nodes.limitation_detail: At ~100+ tokens, two tokens with logprobs within 1e-4 (bfloat16 epsilon) can swap positions due to different matmul accumulation order in batched vs sequential forward passes. This is expected noise, not a logic bug. Evidence: token 14648 vs 78158 both had logprob=-1.250591 (perfect tie) in baseline; bfloat16 noise broke the tie.

nodes.name: 长序列 logprob 重评分 (Logprob Rescore Oracle)
nodes.description: Single-server: generate tokens with speculative decoding, capture logprobs, then rescore the same sequence via prefill (max_new_tokens=0). Compare decode-time logprobs vs rescore logprobs. Tolerance 0.255 (same as CUDA CI) allows bfloat16 accumulation noise while catching real logit computation errors.

nodes.name: 确定性 Token Oracle (Canary)
nodes.description: Deterministic sampling via HashOracle — every token is a hash(req_id, position). CUDA ONLY. NPU attempted verification (2026-06-08): SGLANG_KV_CANARY_ENABLE_TOKEN_ORACLE=1 set, but sglang serve argparse rejects --sampling-backend token_oracle as invalid choice. Root cause: env var check at server_args.py import time fails to resolve on NPU launch path.

nodes.name: GSM8K 统计准确率 (Statistical Accuracy Threshold)
nodes.description: Run GSM8K math benchmark and check accuracy >= threshold (e.g. 0.81). This is the WEAKEST oracle — it catches crashes and catastrophic failures, but is completely blind to silent precision loss, accept rate errors, and any bug where the target model can 'fix' draft errors to still get the right final answer.
nodes.limitation_detail: BUG-2026-098 (eagle3 accept rate error) and BUG-2026-016 (mrope_position race) both passed this test because the target model corrected the draft errors, arriving at the correct final math answer despite wrong intermediate tokens.

nodes.title: 【NPU】【bugfix】accuracy fix when enable both nsa cp and prefixcache
nodes.root_cause: KV sequence length calculations do not include prefix cache lengths when NSA context parallelism is enabled, causing attention to read from wrong KV cache positions (limited evidence)

nodes.title: [NPU] Fix warmup error with --disable-cuda-graph and mtp
nodes.root_cause: Redundant padding tokens in the input tensor cause a dimension mismatch for the NPU fused attention operator during forward_decode with --disable-cuda-graph and MTP

nodes.title: [NPU] [Bugfix] Wan quantization fix
nodes.root_cause: reverse_param_names_mapping discarded in ModelSlim init path, causing _get_scheme_from_parts to use internal model layer names instead of architecture-canonical names for quant config lookup in Wan2.2-T2V-A14B-Diffusers W8A8/mxfp8

nodes.title: [NPU] Fix mrope_position computation in Eagle Worker v2 with PlanStream
nodes.root_cause: Race condition: mrope_position is computed on the plan stream using draft outputs from the default stream when SGLANG_ENABLE_SPEC_V2 and SGLANG_ENABLE_OVERLAP_PLAN_STREAM are both enabled, producing incorrect positional values for Eagle speculative decoding in multimodal scenarios

nodes.title: [Diffusion][NPU][GPU] Fix SANA model execution error
nodes.root_cause: Attn_mask dtype mismatch (float vs expected bool/BFloat16) in NPU attention causing RuntimeError during SANA diffusion model execution, plus additional GPU-side Gemma2 encoder and DPM scheduler errors

nodes.title: [NPU] fix profiler on npu
nodes.root_cause: Torch profiler on NPU lacks experimental_config needed for operator shape recording, causing SGLANG_PROFILE_RECORD_SHAPES to have no effect on NPU

nodes.title: Fix diffusion fallback guards and validation
nodes.root_cause: Native diffusion RoPE fallback (torch/npu path) rejects full-width interleaved cos/sin caches that the Triton path accepts, and CuTe fused scale/shift validation fails for inputs where S is not divisible by F

nodes.title: [NPU] Fix NPU CI
nodes.root_cause: Multiple CI-breaking regressions from PRs #13478 and #13676 affecting NPU memory allocator, CUDA graph runner, input buffers, NPU graph runner, and speculative decoding utilities (limited evidence — PR body has minimal detail)

nodes.title: [Bug fix] Fix Gemma 2 and fix Gemma 3 multimodal with bs > 1 on NPU
nodes.root_cause: Gemma3 multimodal: missing page alignment for chunked batch with batch_size > 1 on NPU. Gemma2: incorrect forward_npu method for GemmaRMSNorm. Phi-3: accuracy regression with tensor parallelism (tp1: 0.85, tp2: 0.75, tp4: 0.56)

nodes.title: [NPU] Fix Z-Image negative-branch rotary embeddings for CFG
nodes.root_cause: Uses batch.prompt_embeds[0] instead of batch.negative_prompt_embeds[0] for RoPE positions in CFG negative branch

nodes.title: [NPU] fix some npu error with OffloaderV2
nodes.root_cause: npu_format_cast on meta tensors (wrong device), storage corruption during MoE weight transpose, and missing weight_loader attribute in OffloaderV2

nodes.title: [NPU] add split_qkv_tp_rmsnorm_rope ops for minimax2 & fix eagle3 hidden states capture in dp attn mode
nodes.root_cause: Hidden state capture timing in Eagle3 speculative decoding combined with CUDA graph and DP attention crashes when batch size > 1 on NPU

nodes.title: [NPU] fix rope_theta get error for baichuan2-13b-chat model
nodes.root_cause: Baichuan2-13b-chat config lacks rope_theta attribute, causing AttributeError during model loading

nodes.title: [NPU] Fix DeepEP LL dispatch BF16 flag and skip triton kernel on NPU for Qwen3.5
nodes.root_cause: DeepEP LL dispatch lacked BF16 env flag for CANN compatibility; triton fused_qkv kernel not supported on NPU

nodes.title: [Fix] NVFP4 qwen3.5 quant error fix by add packed_modules_mapping
nodes.root_cause: Missing packed_modules_mapping for Qwen3.5 NVFP4 quantization, causing model loader to fail mapping quantized weight modules

nodes.title: [NPU] Fix issue and support GLM-4.5V
nodes.root_cause: split_qkv_rmsnorm_rope kernel called with incorrect arguments for GLM-4.5V when use_qk_norm=False on NPU

nodes.title: [NPU]Fix support_triton bug
nodes.root_cause: support_triton function incorrectly disables triton for compute_position on NPU, causing fallback to slower native torch path and MTP performance regression

nodes.title: [diffusion] Fix --warmup-resolutions hang with --enable-cfg-parallel
nodes.root_cause: Synthesized warmup Req objects with guidance_scale=1.0 cause do_classifier_free_guidance=False in CFG-parallel mode, rank1 returns None noise_pred, TypeError at scheduler.step() caught inside GPUWorker causes 30-minute gloo broadcast timeout

nodes.title: [NPU] fix qwen3.5 video processor
nodes.root_cause: Qwen3VLVideoProcessor permute operation with >8 dimensions raises CANN runtime error on NPU (limited evidence: PR body focuses on symptom, exact CANN op not specified)

nodes.title: [NPU] [Bugfix] [diffusion] Fix NZ performance bug for diffusion models
nodes.root_cause: NPU NZ format conversion for CPU-offloaded tensors not supported; torch.npu.config.allow_internal_format incorrectly enabled for non-quantized diffusion models causing hidden performance regression (limited evidence: PR body describes symptoms but not CANN-level mechanism)

nodes.title: [NPU][Bug fix] context parallel bug fix
nodes.root_cause: cp_split_and_rebuild_position split size calculation does not match actual CP split positions on NPU, causing RuntimeError/assertion error

nodes.title: [NPU] bugs fix: fix a condition bug when using speculative inference on Qwen3 and Qwen3 moe
nodes.root_cause: forward_mode.is_extend() condition blocks fused split_qkv_rmsnorm_rope kernel during speculative decode because TARGET_VERIFY forward mode also returns is_extend()=True, making condition always-true during decode

nodes.title: [NPU] bugs fix for Deepseek models
nodes.root_cause: Wrong config key name 'quant_config' instead of 'quantization_config' in mla_preprocess.py causes MLAPO feature to silently fail, producing unquantized output when quantized was requested. DT_UINT64 bootstrap_room crash referenced is fixed by separate PR #19423 and not addressed in this PR.

nodes.title: [NPU] bugfix: resolve modelslim load weights bug
nodes.root_cause: Redundant language_model replace operation in modelslim.py breaks quantized weight loading for Qwen3.5, preventing service startup

nodes.title: bugfix: prioritize init_npu_backend to fix various initialization bugs
nodes.root_cause: NPU backend initialization not prioritized in startup sequence, causing various initialization crashes including EPD encoder not properly adapted for NPU (limited evidence — PR body contains only error screenshot and brief description)

nodes.title: Fix Bug on dsv3.2
nodes.root_cause: nas_Indexer forward_npu dual stream cannot be properly closed on NPU, causing crashes in some cases; torch.compile(dynamic=True) backend not working on NPU for DSV3.2

nodes.title: [NPU] NZ for non-quantized MOE, Qwen3 MOE double memory consumption fix
nodes.root_cause: Double memory consumption for Qwen3 MOE models on Ascend NPU due to incorrect memory allocation, risking OOM; NZ format conversion for non-quantized MOE is a performance optimization, not a bug fix

nodes.title: fix gpt-oss launch failure with piecewise cuda graph
nodes.root_cause: NPU support code causes gpt-oss launch failure with piecewise CUDA graph: traceback shows crash in fused_moe_triton mxfp4 quantization path

nodes.title: [NPU]bugfix: fix for dsv3.2 and dsvl2
nodes.root_cause: DS-VL2 rotary_embedding bug, DSV32 alt_stream compatibility, and YARN RoPE detection produce wrong RoPE values for attention

nodes.title: [NPU] [Bug Fix] Fix typo in npu device check in gpt_oss.py
nodes.root_cause: Typo in NPU device check in gpt_oss.py causes NPU activation function to be used on all devices, not just NPU

nodes.title: [NPU] [BUGFIX] Fix NPU inference (torch_npu._npu_reshape_and_cache() crash)
nodes.root_cause: Wrong argument order in NPUMHATokenToKVPool super().__init__() call after PR #15207 added optional arguments, causing head_dim/head_num values to be scrambled (head_dim becomes 'True'), crashing torch_npu._npu_reshape_and_cache()

nodes.title: [BUGFIX]Fix Ascend backend pre-allocated range in NPU Graph Mode.
nodes.root_cause: Execution exceeded pre-allocated graph range in NPU Graph Mode when speculative_num_draft_tokens was enabled

nodes.title: [Bugfix] [NPU] Fix check_env on Ascend for CANN 8.5
nodes.root_cause: check_env fails on CANN 8.5 due to changed bisheng compiler path, no fallback for older paths

nodes.title: [Fix] eagle/eagle3 speculative decoding conflicts with xgrammar in NPU
nodes.root_cause: NPU's apply_token_bitmask_inplace_triton fails to enforce XGrammar token masks for Eagle/Eagle3 speculative decoding on Ascend NPU, allowing masked tokens to retain high logits and be selected

nodes.title: [Bugfix] [NPU] Qwen3.5 with quantization fix
nodes.root_cause: incorrect packed_module_mapping for fused in_proj_qkvz and in_proj_ba layers after Qwen3.5 model refactoring, causing RuntimeError during quantized weight loading

nodes.title: [NPU] fix conflict between empty_cache and use_mem_pool
nodes.root_cause: empty_cache operation called within torch.npu.use_mem_pool context region creates memory management conflict on NPU backend

nodes.title: Fix bug in dbrx model
nodes.root_cause: DbrxAttentionConfig missing rope_parameters attribute, causing AttributeError when dbrx model code accesses rope configuration

nodes.title: [Bugfix] fix npu get kv_item_lens in PD separation when use ASCEND_US…
nodes.root_cause: wrong kv_item_lens computation in PD separation when ASCEND_USE_FIA changes k_buffer shape from (layer_num, pages, page_size, head_num, head_dim) to (layer_num, pages*page_size, 1, head_num, head_dim), missing page_size multiplication factor in get_contiguous_buf_infos() element size calculation

nodes.title: [NPU][Diffusion] fix sp modulate for qwen-image-edit
nodes.root_cause: Indexed fused modulation kernels lack CUDA-only guard, causing crash on NPU for qwen-image-edit

nodes.title: [bug fix] use npu phy id in container env
nodes.root_cause: mooncake transfer engine uses gpu_id instead of NPU physical ID from ASCEND_NPU_PHY_ID env var in container environments, causing wrong device ID mapping for disaggregation backend

nodes.title: [NPU]Fix GLM-4.7-Flash failed on NPU
nodes.root_cause: GPU op optimizations (dsv3_router_gemm import guard, missing _gfx95_quant_format member) cause GLM-4.7-Flash to fail on NPU

nodes.title: [NPU] fix eagle3 accept rate
nodes.root_cause: NPU Eagle3 graph and non-graph implementations missing per-step sequence length updates for draft tokens in ascend_backend and eagle_draft_npu_graph_runner, causing incorrect accept rate computation in speculative decoding because seq_len stays at initial value instead of incrementing per draft step

nodes.title: [Fix] Patch is_flash_attn_2_available for flash-attn-4 in VLM input format test
nodes.root_cause: flash-attn-4 namespace package registers as importable flash_attn with no actual content, causing transformers.utils.is_flash_attn_2_available() to return True and HF remote model code to attempt importing nonexistent symbols (flash_attn_func, flash_attn_varlen_func) from empty namespace, causing ImportError on VLM model loading

nodes.title: [Fix] Slice input_embeds to extend_input_len in prepare_for_extend
nodes.root_cause: PrefillAdder chunk truncation in scheduler adjusts fill_ids and extend_input_len but not req.input_embeds when chunked_prefill_size is exceeded on concurrent input_embeds requests, causing shape mismatch RuntimeError in set_kv_buffer because out_cache_loc is sized for truncated length but input_embeds is full length

nodes.title: [Fix] NPU deepep hccl buffer and fix IPC safe check
nodes.root_cause: insufficient HCCL buffer allocation for deepep token dispatch on NPU and missing IPC handle safe serialization for torch_npu

nodes.title: [Diffusion] [NPU] [CI] fix CI performance
nodes.root_cause: default layerwise offload policy for NPU causing suboptimal decode stage performance on slower CI servers (limited evidence)

nodes.title: [NPU] Fix disaggregation metadata buffer bootstrap_room_dtype for npu backend
nodes.root_cause: wrong bootstrap_room_dtype for NPU in disaggregation metadata buffer causing tensor type mismatch crash (limited evidence)

nodes.title: [NPU] Fix a corner case where FusedMoE.top_k is not explicitly declared
nodes.root_cause: FusedMoE.top_k is None for models like Llama4, OLMoE where top_k is not set during init, causing TypeError crash when accessed

nodes.title: [NPU] Bug fix in device detect
nodes.root_cause: NPU device detection (is_npu()) returns False when RL frameworks such as Ray/verl control ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES environment variable

nodes.title: [NPU]Fix for ipc handle with npu
nodes.root_cause: NPU does not support UUID for IPC tensor handles, causing RuntimeError in torch_npu multiprocessing reductions

nodes.title: [NPU] fix for NPU memory settings logic
nodes.root_cause: NPU memory default settings processed through generic GPU memory settings handler causing incorrect branch selection (npu_memory_settings_branching)

nodes.title: [NPU] bug fix for multi stream
nodes.root_cause: MTP multi-stream optimization incompatible with NPU, causing errors requiring revert (limited evidence)

nodes.title: [BugFix] fix prefixcache performance and accuracy on ascend
nodes.root_cause: slow CPU-device transfer pattern for device_indices in cache_controller.py and missing npu_ring_mla operator integration for segmented MLA attention computation on Ascend

nodes.title: [Ascend] fix AscendAttnMaskBuilder bug to support float16 models
nodes.root_cause: AscendAttnMaskBuilder.generate_attn_mask missing float16 dtype handling, causing incorrect attention mask generation for float16 models on Ascend

nodes.title: [NPU] fix pp_size>1
nodes.root_cause: hardcoded .cuda() and torch.cuda calls in pipeline parallelism distributed code causing RuntimeError on NPU; replaced with torch.get_device_module() and .to() for device-agnostic behavior, plus AscendTokenToKVPool creation parameter fix

nodes.title: [Bug fix] Fix ascend mla in aclgraph
nodes.root_cause: autocontiguous bug in mla operator within aclgraph mode on Ascend NPU, causing RuntimeError and kernel launch failure for DeepSeek-R1-0528 with batch>1; fix manually calls .contiguous() on query input

nodes.title: 【NPU】【bugfix】fix server error when mtp unquant
nodes.root_cause: Broken dispatch path in unquantized MTP models causes server error when MTP is used without quantization

nodes.title: [Bugfix] Fix Ascend NPU CP attention for batch size > 1
nodes.root_cause: Removed scalar fields (actual_seq_q_prev, etc.) in ContextParallelMetadata cause AttributeError crash in NPU CP attention path (bs>=1); additionally, incorrect torch.chunk split produces wrong attention output for bs>1

nodes.title: [Mamba] Fix extra_buffer overlap schedule races
nodes.root_cause: Race conditions in extra_buffer overlap schedule in Mamba where concurrent buffer operations access overlapping memory regions without proper synchronization

nodes.title: [NPU] Fix TypeError in get_state_buf_infos when index_head_dim is None on MLA
nodes.root_cause: TypeError in get_state_buf_infos when index_head_dim is None on MLA models on NPU, missing None guard

nodes.title: [NPU]fix:NPUMLATokenToKVPool object has no attribute "kv_buffer"
nodes.root_cause: NPUMLATokenToKVPool class missing the kv_buffer attribute that the parent class or calling code expects

nodes.title: [Spec] Mamba scatter cleanup; fix multi-layer positional bug; dflash naming
nodes.root_cause: Incorrect position indexing across multiple Mamba layers in speculative decoding, causing wrong draft token positions (limited evidence)

nodes.title: [NPU] fix normal DeepEP mode num_tokens_per_rdma_rank error caused by none
nodes.root_cause: NoneType error in DeepEP normal mode when num_tokens_per_rdma_rank is None, lacking a default or guard

nodes.title: [NPU] fix model llava-onevision-qwen2-7b-ov torch compiles error in npu case
nodes.root_cause: torch.compile graph execution fails on NPU backend for apply_scaling_penalties due to incompatible ops or graph breaks; fix disables torch.compile entirely on NPU

nodes.title: [Fix][NPU] Preserve existing packed_modules_mapping when merging model-level fused module mappings
nodes.root_cause: Direct assignment (=) in DeepseekV2ForCausalLM.__init__ overwrites pre-populated quant_config.packed_modules_mapping dict (with nested structure including 'model' key), replacing it with a flat dict, causing ModelSlim's get('model', {}) to return empty dict and triggering NoneType crash in create_weights

nodes.title: [NPU] fix model ERNIE-4.5-21B-A3B-PT bias need 1D error
nodes.root_cause: ERNIE-4.5 bias tensor has 2D shape but the NPU backend requires 1D bias, causing a shape mismatch error

nodes.title: [diffusion] Fix multi image input for GLM-Image
nodes.root_cause: Shape mismatch in GLM-Image diffusion model when concatenating multiple image inputs — second image tensor dim 2 [32] does not match first tensor [96], causing aclnnCat to fail with an NPU runtime error

nodes.title: [Diffusion] [NPU] Fix HunyuanVideo crash on NPU
nodes.root_cause: NPU Torch SDPA backend returns non-contiguous attention output tensors, causing Tensor.view() to fail with RuntimeError ('view size is not compatible with input tensor's size and stride') in the HunyuanVideo diffusion denoising step

nodes.title: [Bug Fix] Align glm4_moe_nextn NPU MTP loading with qwen3 MTP
nodes.root_cause: GLM4 MoE NextN NPU MTP loading logic diverged from the Qwen3 MTP reference implementation, causing incorrect model initialization

nodes.title: Fix fused_moe import for non-NPU devices
nodes.root_cause: fused_moe module import path breaks on non-NPU devices due to incorrect conditional import or missing guard (limited evidence — PR body is empty, only template)

edges.evidence: Crash produces error response, assertEqual catches it immediately
Any token difference is caught by exact string comparison within 16 tokens
Accept rate errors may cause token divergence within 16 tokens if severe; mild errors may not surface this quickly

edges.reason: Mild accept rate errors corrected by target model may not surface within 16 tokens

edges.evidence: Compatibility breaks typically cause immediate crash or wrong output

edges.reason: bfloat16 near-tie noise beyond 16 tokens — a precision issue that doesn't change argmax is invisible to exact match
If logits are wrong but argmax is unchanged (near-tie), exact match won't catch it
Exact match only checks correctness, not speed

edges.evidence: Logprob comparison with 0.255 tolerance catches logit shifts; same-server design avoids cross-instance noise
Direct comparison of decode vs prefill logprobs on same server; any computation error >0.255 in logprob space is caught
Crash prevents response, test fails on HTTP error
Token divergence causes different output_token_ids → rescore of different sequence → logprob mismatch
Wrong accept rate → wrong KV cache state → different logprobs at affected positions

edges.reason: Logprob rescore checks correctness, not speed

edges.evidence: Runtime error on any token mismatch
Every token is predetermined — any deviation is a precision error and raises immediately
Deterministic token sequence — any divergence is a runtime error
Wrong accept rate changes sequence → runtime error on mismatch
Any computation error that changes any token is caught immediately
Severe compatibility issues may drop accuracy below threshold

edges.reason: Target model corrects draft errors → final math answer may still be right → accuracy unchanged. BUG-2026-016 and BUG-2026-098 both passed this test.
Wrong accept rate → target model fixes tokens → output still correct → GSM8K accuracy unchanged
Statistical accuracy is insensitive to individual logit errors
GSM8K only checks final math answer regex extraction — intermediate token divergence invisible if final answer correct
